channel.title: Frontity Starter theme
channel.description:
Hello, this is the starter theme I've built for frontity:
* **Demo**: https://frontity-starter-theme.alexadark.vercel.app/ * **Github**: https://github.com/alexadark/frontity-starter-theme * **npm**: https://www.npmjs.com/package/frontity-starter-theme
It's styled with theme-ui (https://theme-ui.com/), which is super flexible, and brings dark mode! and for interactive elements like the slide menu I used grommet (https://v2.grommet.io/) which is built on the styled system like theme-ui, so you can have a central theme to rules your styles!
The goal of this work was first to learn frontity building something real, and also build a tool for myself and the community, simple enough to let creativity open, allowing to build something totally different on top of it, but with well organized files and all the basic functionalities (I have not build a search, but I will as soon as I have time), as well as nice enough to be used directly, and pleasant to begin a new project.
So I hope you will like it!
I have worked a lot with gatsby before discovering frontity (I'm about to launch the firsts premium gatsby wp themes: https://gatsbywpthemes.com/ , and I also plan to port theses theme to frontity!) so I can say that both frameworks have their utility, what I have loved in frontity is the fact that you can publish in wordpress and see it published immediately in frontity, and I love the centralized state! Impatient to build real clients frontity websites!
Feedback and PR are welcome!
I plan also to grab a video to show how I build it!

item.title: Frontity Starter theme
item.dc:creator: alexaspalato
item.description:
I’ve just published the new version with built-in search

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity Starter theme
item.dc:creator: alexaspalato
item.description:
@a.elnagdy87 Hey thank you!
I’m actually making some improvements to the theme :build in search and updates
will publish it soon
Sorry, I was not very active lastly, lot of work!

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity Starter theme
item.dc:creator: popat.jitendra
item.description:
@alexaspalato This is really what i am waiting in my first step

Thanks for sharing Let me try and give you feedback for same

Kudos to your work, Thanks

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity Starter theme
item.dc:creator: a.elnagdy87
item.description:
I love it, great work @alexaspalato !

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity Starter theme
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Really nice looking theme. Great work @alexaspalato!

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity Starter theme
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
The theme looks great! Thanks for sharing this, Alexandra!

I’m sure it will help inspire many other users to create some awesome projects!

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity Starter theme
item.dc:creator: alexaspalato
item.description:
Thank you!
I’m impatient to see what you will build with it!

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity Starter theme
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Awesome work @alexaspalato, it looks really nice

And welcome to the community!

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity Starter theme
item.dc:creator: ShaGui
item.description:
This is really great! Thank so much for sharing a fantastic starter theme. I may use it as start for my next project!

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity Starter theme
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Welcome to the community @alexaspalato

Really happy to see the result of your first Frontity project, thanks for sharing it with us and also for giving such a great starter theme to the community

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity Starter theme
item.dc:creator: alexaspalato
item.description:
Hello,
this is the starter theme I’ve built for frontity:

  • Demo: https://frontity-starter-theme.alexadark.vercel.app/
  • Github: https://github.com/alexadark/frontity-starter-theme
  • npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/frontity-starter-theme

It’s styled with theme-ui (https://theme-ui.com/), which is super flexible, and brings dark mode!
and for interactive elements like the slide menu I used grommet (https://v2.grommet.io/) which is built on the styled system like theme-ui, so you can have a central theme to rules your styles!

The goal of this work was first to learn frontity building something real, and also build a tool for myself and the community, simple enough to let creativity open, allowing to build something totally different on top of it, but with well organized files and all the basic functionalities (I have not build a search, but I will as soon as I have time), as well as nice enough to be used directly, and pleasant to begin a new project.

So I hope you will like it!

I have worked a lot with gatsby before discovering frontity (I’m about to launch the firsts premium gatsby wp themes: https://gatsbywpthemes.com/ , and I also plan to port theses theme to frontity!) so I can say that both frameworks have their utility, what I have loved in frontity is the fact that you can publish in wordpress and see it published immediately in frontity, and I love the centralized state! Impatient to build real clients frontity websites!

Feedback and PR are welcome!

I plan also to grab a video to show how I build it!

Read full topic
